completed_tasks.name: Task 1: Campaign Echo Admin Handler and Route Registrations
Task 2: Campaigns HTML/TEMPL Views and Sidebar Integration

decisions.rationale: Added MessagesContext tracking to CampaignWorker struct to call msgCtx.Stop() on cancel/shutdown, preventing worker test blockages.

decisions.decision: Avoid JS Double Braces in TEMPL
decisions.rationale: Mapped double braces dynamically via string concatenation in template views to prevent a-h/templ parsing issues.
Disabled Go package parallelization using -p 1 to prevent concurrent DB migrations and metadata conflicts on check constraint type updates.

next_action: Complete milestone using /gsd-complete-milestone or start next milestone.
context_notes: Milestone v1.1 for Campaign Engine is fully completed. All tests pass cleanly. Background worker, API endpoints, and admin UI views are verified and committed.
